calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-12-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Daniel Byrne appeared by zoom for Jeffrey Finerman (petitioner).

The court noted that the will said that everything goes to Margaret if she survives distribution, that she did not survive distribution, that there is no joint tenancy in the one third interest of the Peabody property that they got from Jeffrey and informed Mr. Byrne that a one sixth interest is going to have to be probated in Eugene's estate. Mr. Byrne stated that no matter which way they go, fifty percent goes to each of the sons, that if the court is not inclined to approve this, he will petition for final distribution as to the one third interest as they will need to clear title and asked if the court would acknowledge that the one third interest was effectively transferred to the surviving spouse. The court suggested Mr. Byrne provide an order and noted that this is not a quiet title action. Mr. Byrne stated that he can deal with this in final distribution in both of the estates. The Petition for Spousal Property is off calendar.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Lee. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-08-2021 Continued To Oct-12-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
